_comment: SDD enforcement config. Set hard_block_ac to true after 30-day soft trial.

securityScan._comment: wave-165: hardBlockEnabled=true causes detect-injection.mjs to call writeHaltState and exit 42. Default false = soft-flag (event emitted, dispatch continues).

memoryGuard._comment: 2026-W27 rank 4: scripts/memory-guard.mjs is a PreToolUse write-time gate on memory (author != admitter, default-reject no-verdict, TF-IDF dedup). Kept SOFT (not wired as a hard PreToolUse hook) until its precondition holds: memory-writers emit author+verdict AND >=2 judges are calibrated. gate-graduation tracks readiness; do NOT flip to a blocking hook before then.

constitutionalDrift._comment: wave-166: hardBlockEnabled=true causes detect-constitutional-drift.mjs to call writeHaltState and exit 42. Default false = soft-flag (event emitted, script exits 0).

specStructural._comment: wave spec-tree-overhaul: spec-structural-gate.mjs is a RATCHET wired into pre-push + CI. It hard-blocks any INCREASE in broken refs / orphans / missing-meta above docs/metrics/spec-structural-baseline.json, and auto-tightens the baseline when debt drops. Pre-existing debt stays soft (driftDetection above), so the line is not paralyzed.

doraMonitoring._comment: wave-168: doraMonitoring.hardBlockEnabled=true causes compute-dora.mjs to call writeHaltState on Low-band metric breach. Default false = report only (exit 0 regardless of band).

costMonitoring._comment: wave-177: costMonitoring. hardBlockEnabled=true causes compute-cost.mjs to call writeHaltState on budget breach (Elevated or Spike band). Default false = report only (exit 0 regardless of band). budgetThreshold_usd: rolling monthly threshold; covers observed run rate (~$0.03-$1.20 per wave) with headroom.

carbonMonitoring._comment: wave-186: carbonMonitoring. hardBlockEnabled=true causes compute-carbon.mjs to call writeHaltState on budget breach (Elevated or Spike band). Default false = report only (exit 0 regardless of band). carbonBudget_gco2e: soft reference budget (50,000 gCO2e = ~50 kg CO2e). At central estimate (~0.442 gCO2e per 1K tokens) this covers ~113M tokens — well above current pipeline run rate. All gCO2e outputs are factor-based estimations, not measurements.

verificationGate._comment: Blocking verification gate (verify-gate.mjs). pre-commit runs tsc; pre-push runs tsc+tests+build. hardBlockEnabled:true = broken code cannot commit/push.
